payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent, highest-confidence entry, while mem_old from Goldman was superseded and filtered out as outdated.
payload.decision: Recall mem_new for Sam from Goldman; mem_old for Sam from Goldman was superseded and filtered out due to being older/versioned.

entity_resolution.reason: mem_old was superseded by mem_new due to recency and higher confidence; only the latest authoritative memory remains active.

An older memory entry for Sam from Goldman exists but is superseded by mem_new and thus not considered current.

details: Mem_old marked superseded and not surfaced in recall
